info.title: QASA API Documentation
info.description: API documentation for QASA Laravel application - invoicing and client management system

200.description: Login successful, or a 2FA challenge if the account has two-factor authentication enabled

challenge_token.description: Present only when two_factor_required is true; pass to POST /auth/2fa/verify

post.summary: Upload supplier logo printed on invoices

get.summary: Export all account data as JSON (GDPR data portability)

403.description: Only the account owner can export data

delete.summary: Delete (soft-delete) the account and revoke all tokens

password.description: Required for accounts with a password

403.description: Only the account owner can delete the account

get.summary: Verify email address (signed link from the verification email)

200.description: Google login successful, or a 2FA challenge if the account has two-factor authentication enabled

challenge_token.description: Present only when two_factor_required is true; pass to POST /auth/2fa/verify

200.description: Reset link sent if the account exists

message.example: Ak účet existuje, poslali sme naň odkaz na obnovenie hesla.

post.summary: Reset password using a token from the reset email
Create a scoped personal access token
post.description: The plaintext token is returned only in this response and cannot be retrieved again.

completed.description: True once every non-optional item is done

post.summary: Start 2FA setup — generates an unconfirmed secret
Confirm 2FA setup with a TOTP code — activates it and returns recovery codes

delete.summary: Disable 2FA — requires password and a valid TOTP or recovery code

password.description: Required unless the account has no password (Google-only)

post.summary: Regenerate recovery codes — invalidates the previous set

200.description: New recovery codes — shown only once

post.summary: Complete login by verifying a 2FA code against a login challenge

422.description: Cannot delete client with existing orders or invoices

get.summary: Fetch company data from a public register (ARES/RPO) by IČO

422.description: Company not found or unsupported country

get.summary: Verify a VAT identification number (IČ DPH) via VIES

parameters.name: client_id
parameters.description: Stamps vat_verified_at on this client when the check succeeds

get.summary: List contact persons for a client

404.description: Not found, or expense has no attachment

post.summary: Upload or replace the expense attachment

422.description: Invalid file type or too large

404.description: Not found, or expense has no attachment

get.summary: Export issued invoices as a Stormware Pohoda dataPack XML
Export issued invoices as a KROS Omega text-import file
get.description: Unverified against the current KROS column specification — see config/omega.php.

200.description: KROS Omega text-import file download (Windows-1250 encoded)

get.summary: Export received (supplier) invoices as a KROS Omega text-import file
get.description: Unverified against the current KROS column specification — see config/omega.php.

200.description: KROS Omega text-import file download (Windows-1250 encoded)

get.summary: Export a single issued invoice or credit note as ISDOC 6.0.2 XML

422.description: Draft, storno or proforma invoices are not exportable

post.summary: Upload a document directly into the invoice inbox

201.description: Invoice inbox item created from the uploaded file

422.description: Invalid file type/size, or the file was already uploaded before

post.summary: Convert a reviewed inbox item into a supplier invoice

201.description: Supplier invoice created from the inbox item

422.description: Validation error, client is not a vendor, or item already processed

post.summary: Record an incoming payment for an invoice

422.description: Validation error or invoice state does not allow payments

get.summary: Public invoice payload for the client-facing page (no auth)
Public quote payload for the client-facing page (no auth)

post.summary: Client accepts the quote (no auth, one-shot)
Client rejects the quote (no auth, one-shot)

422.description: Validation error or quote not editable

403.description: Only draft quotes can be deleted

422.description: Validation error or quote not editable

post.summary: Email the quote PDF to the client (sends the quote first when still a draft)

422.description: Validation error or client without email

post.summary: Create (or return the existing) public link for the quote; pass regenerate=true for a fresh token
Convert an accepted (or sent) quote into a draft invoice
Convert an accepted (or sent) quote into an order

first_issue_date.description: Must not be in the past

post.summary: Resume a paused template (skipped periods are not backfilled)

get.summary: KPI cards, period comparison and profit charts
get.description: All figures converted to the user's default currency. Cached for 5 minutes.

get.summary: Revenue/cost/profit tables by year and by month

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Year for the by_month breakdown (defaults to the current year)

get.summary: Aging buckets for open receivables and payables, per currency
Top clients, top suppliers, and churn risk

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max entries per currency for the top-clients/top-suppliers rankings (default 10, max 50)

get.summary: DSO/DPO, payment morale, revenue concentration and working capital cycle

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search internal or vendor document number

422.description: Validation error or client is not a vendor
Validation error, client is not a vendor, or invoice not editable

403.description: Only draft supplier invoices can be deleted

paid_at.description: Used when transitioning to paid; defaults to today

post.summary: Verify the stored vendor account against the CZ VAT payer register (CRPDPH)

200.description: Verification result; on a mismatch the published accounts are listed for manual comparison

422.description: No stored account, vendor is not a CZ VAT payer, or the register is unreachable

get.summary: Payment QR for the received invoice (CZK → SPAYD, EUR → SEPA EPC)

200.description: SVG payment QR as a data URI

422.description: No stored account or unsupported currency

get.summary: EU sales list (súhrnný výkaz) basis — intra-EU reverse-charged invoices grouped by month and client VAT ID
VAT control statement basis (SK: kontrolný výkaz DPH / CZ: kontrolní hlášení) — data preparation only, not a filing

422.description: Validation error or the account is not a VAT payer

get.summary: VAT control statement XML draft (CZ: DPHKH1 / SK: KVDPH_2025) — draft for review before filing, not a submission-ready document

422.description: Validation error or the account is not a VAT payer
Validation error or invoice not editable

403.description: Only draft invoices can be deleted

expected_updated_at.description: Optimistic lock: the updated_at value last seen by the client. A mismatch returns 409.

409.description: expected_updated_at does not match the invoice's current updated_at

422.description: Validation error or invoice not editable
Validation error or invoice not editable
Validation error or order has no billable items

post.summary: Email the invoice PDF to the client (issues the invoice first when still a draft)

to.description: Override recipient; defaults to the client email

message.description: Custom message shown in the email body

403.description: Not allowed to email this invoice

422.description: Validation error, cancelled invoice or client without email

post.summary: Send a payment reminder e-mail for an overdue invoice (throttled by cooldown)

403.description: Not allowed to remind on this invoice

422.description: Invoice not sent, cooldown active or client without email

post.summary: Create a credit note (dobropis) or storno for an issued invoice
Settle a fully paid proforma into an ordinary tax invoice

201.description: Ordinary invoice created from the settled proforma, already paid

422.description: Not a proforma, not fully paid yet, or already settled

post.summary: Create (or return the existing) public link for the invoice; pass regenerate=true for a fresh token

422.description: Invalid file type, too large, or upload failed
Cannot delete order with existing invoices

403.description: Forbidden or only author and managers can delete

get.summary: List activity log entries for the account

overdue_digest_enabled.description: Whether the owner receives a daily digest e-mail of invoices newly past due

owner.description: Account owner info when this user is a team member

suggestions.description: Parsed field suggestions for prefilling the review form

invoice_number.description: Null until the invoice is issued (drafts have no number yet)

settled_invoice_id.description: Set on a proforma once settled into an ordinary invoice

emailed_at.description: Last time the invoice was queued for email delivery

emailed_to.description: Primary recipient of the last email

emailed_cc.description: CC recipients of the last email

email_failed_at.description: Set when the queued email job permanently failed; cleared on the next send

last_reminded_at.description: Last time a payment reminder was sent

balance.description: Outstanding amount — total minus recorded payments

reverse_charge.description: Intent only — re-resolved from the current client at each generation

auto_send.description: Issue and email generated invoices automatically

self_assessed_vat_amount.description: Mirrors vat_amount for self-assessed regimes; not owed to the vendor

tags.name: Tokens
tags.description: Scoped personal access tokens for third-party integrations

tags.name: BankAccounts
tags.description: Supplier bank accounts printed on invoices

tags.name: Expense Attachments
tags.description: Manage the receipt/invoice document attached to an expense

tags.name: Invoice Export
tags.description: Bulk export of issued invoices for accounting handoff

tags.name: InvoiceInbox
tags.description: Review queue for supplier invoices scanned from the inbox folder

tags.name: Recurring Invoice Templates
tags.description: Templates that generate draft invoices on a schedule. Note and item description fields support period placeholders {BOM}, {EOM}, {MONTH}, {YEAR} resolved at generation time against the tax date (issue date for proforma).

tags.name: Statistics
tags.description: BI dashboard endpoints — KPIs, aging, top partners, financial health and year/month tables

tags.name: VatRates
tags.description: Per-tenant VAT rate catalog used to validate item VAT rates
